headline: Incyte Buys Vega To Add Late Stage Von Willebrand Disease Opportunity
summary: Incyte (NasdaqGS:INCY) agreed to acquire Vega Therapeutics in an all cash deal valued at up to US$2b. The transaction brings Vega's late stage subcutaneous antibody therapy candidate, VGA039, for von Willebrand disease into Incyte's portfolio. VGA039 holds multiple FDA designations and targets an area of significant unmet medical need. For you as an investor, this deal adds a hematology focused asset to NasdaqGS:INCY that sits outside its existing core franchises. Von Willebrand disease is...
